description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 2, 2024 at 10:54 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a plastic crate on East 3rd Street at South Central Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling westbound in the center lane on East 3rd Street, crossing the intersection with South Central Avenue when 
the front passenger side of the Waymo AV made contact with a plastic crate that was in the roadway within the Waymo AV’s lane of travel. 
The contact with the Waymo AV caused the crate to move into the adjacent right lane, which was occupied by a scooterist. The front tire of 
the scooter made contact with the crate and the scooter and scooterist fell. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was 
engaged in autonomous mode. Given the speed at which the scooter was traveling at the time of the contact, the scooter may have sustained 
damage.  
Print
Clear Form
